notes: Official DJI Dock 2 partner and distributor for Benelux; operates and showcases DJI Dock 3 in Dutch construction project.
First company in the Netherlands to put a DJI Dock into operation; also sells DJI Dock 3 + Matrice 4TD combo.
Largest DJI Enterprise dealer in Benelux; runs FlytBase-powered DJI Dock 2 demos and provided two DJI Dock 3 systems for Defqon.1 security operations.
Netherlands-based drone software company; integrates DJI Dock into its platform and provides regulatory compliance support for DJI Dock deployments in Europe.
Dutch drone automation firm; its Dronebotics Commando Centrum software supports DJI Dock 2 and is integrating DJI Dock 3 for autonomous security and inspection tasks.
BVLOS systems integrator that flies its DJI Dock and DJI Dock 2 over 4G and delivered the Hazeldonk DJI Dock 2 dronebox project for the municipality of Breda.
Enschede-based autonomy software vendor; SAI-HUB DD provides offline, on-premises autonomy and AI analytics for DJI Dock 2 and Dock 3, with demos at Brandweer Twente.
Amsterdam-based drone operations company; publishes in-depth content on DJI Dock 2 and operated two DJI Dock 3 systems for live security and crowd monitoring at Defqon.1.
Official DJI Enterprise dealer for Benelux; markets DJI Matrice 4-series with DJI Dock 3 for autonomous security, inspection and public safety missions.
Benelux-certified DJI Dock 3 partner offering demos, regulatory support and local after-sales service for customers in Belgium, the Netherlands and Luxembourg.
Listed by DJI as a Netherlands enterprise dealer; snippet shows offering DJI Dock 3 and FlightHub 2 On-Premises solutions.
Dutch camera and drone retailer listing DJI Dock 2 (Overseas) for sale, targeting professional remote drone operations.
Value-added distributor in the Netherlands offering the DJI Dock 3 (Overseas Edition) to AV and enterprise channel partners.
Enterprise drone reseller; Matrice 3TD product page explicitly positions the drone for use in combination with DJI Dock 2 for mapping, inspection and security.
AirHub integrated the DJI Dock for a search-and-rescue mission together with KNRM, demonstrating remote incident response from a DJI Dock-based system.
First Dutch municipality to receive BVLOS permission for a dronebox of the type DJI Dock 2 at Hazeldonk business park, operated together with partners including Mapture.ai.
Regional fire brigade referenced by Spectro-AI as hosting demonstrations of its SAI-HUB platform for the DJI Dock system for automated incident response.
